<!-- source-snippet repo="scribe" path="docs/user/sdlc-howtos/applications/develop/pqs/index.rst" commit="9066c81716d62cbb879e677d5bec96bb5324891f" snippet="scribe-rst-code-docs-user-sdlc-howtos-applications-develop-pqs-index-sql-122" location="lines:122-126" -->
```sql
   select ia.contract_id, ip.contract_id
   from active('IssuerApproval', 'some_offset') ia
   inner join active('IssuerProposal', 'some_offset') ip
     on ia.payload->>'transferId' = ip.payload->>'transferId';

```
